Package com.group02.tars.entity

Class Application

java.lang.Object
com.group02.tars.entity.Application
public class Application extends Object
Application record stored in applications.json.

The userId field links to a User, and jobId links to a Job.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    applicationId
    Unique application identifier, such as APP001.
    String
    jobId
    Job id for the applied posting.
    String
    reviewNote
    Review note entered by the module organizer.
    String
    status
    Review status, such as pending, selected, or rejected.
    String
    updatedAt
    Last update date in YYYY-MM-DD form.
    String
    userId
    User id of the TA who submitted the application.
